---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're facing.

> Example: "When I browse a site with a long redirect chain, the extension doesn't detect the final destination URL..."

## Proposed Solution

How you'd like this to work. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about, and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Impact

Which part of the extension does this affect?

- [ ] URL risk detection (heuristics / ML)
- [ ] DOM content scanning (content script)
- [ ] Gamification (XP / badges / levels)
- [ ] Warning banners / UI
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Backend NPU integration
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Privacy / security

## Will You Implement This?

- [ ] Yes, I plan to open a PR
- [ ] No, I'm requesting this for someone else to implement

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
